title: Custom Totem 3D
description: Customizable 3D Totem resource pack that lets you use your own skin as the Totem of Undying
body:
Replace the boring default Totem of Undying with your very own Minecraft skin!
The **Spunky Custom Totem 3D Resourcepack** lets you carry a **miniature version of yourself** every time you hold or use the Totem of Undying.

---

## ✨ Features

* Works with **Minecraft 1.16 → 1.21.8** (and newer updates).
* Converts your skin into a **3D Totem of Undying**.
* Lightweight and lag-free perfect for any world or server.
* Quick setup, no coding or modeling needed.

---

## 📸 Preview

![3D Totem Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cdaf47ec96b574f142a35393d5af2a2f6b3b83d9_0.webp)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68247d575b5bf5d6e685bf97d8812acc7f35ed47.png)

---

## How to Use

1. Install the texture pack and put it in your `resourcepacks` folder  
2. Download your skin in `.png` format  
3. Rename the skin png to `totem_of_undying.png`  
4. Open the resource pack and go to `assets/minecraft/textures/item`  
5. Replace the file in there with the one you downloaded  


## 📌 Notes

* Works on both **singleplayer and multiplayer**.
* Compatible with most other resourcepacks.
* Update-proof for future Minecraft versions.

## Support

If you want to suggest anything, report a bug, or vote on future packs, then [join my discord ](https://discord.com/invite/spunky-insaan-851780887271571456)and you can message me in there. I will usually respond very quickly.
